command: uv run --with snowflake-connector-python contractforge-snowflake smoke-access-policy --connect-options .tmp/snowflake-hashdiff-live/connect-options.yaml --connection cfingestsvc-pat --table-prefix CF_SMOKE_ACCESS_MATURITY --execute --execute-cleanup --output-dir .tmp/snowflake-access-policy-smoke

result.blocked_at: CREATE OR REPLACE ROW ACCESS POLICY

decision.reason: The connected Snowflake account does not support ROW ACCESS POLICY. ContractForge keeps table grants, comments/tags and validate-only governance in the supported Snowflake surface, but excludes row access and masking policy certification from stable-final on accounts where those native policy features are unavailable.
decision.planner_behavior: Do not silently apply weaker filtering or masking semantics when Snowflake policy features are unavailable.

required_before_promotion: Rerun smoke-access-policy on a Snowflake account or edition where ROW ACCESS POLICY and masking policy features are available.
Record policy positive/negative read results, query ids and ctrl_ingestion_access evidence.
Keep masking-policy and table-grant checks in the same smoke payload when the row access policy blocker is removed.
open_items: None for the current Snowflake stable-final claim; policy enforcement promotion requires a different Snowflake account feature set.
